signup.title: Create account
signup.step1Desc: Enter your email to get started

signup.emailSentDesc: We sent you a verification link. Click it to activate your account.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.sentDesc: We sent a password reset link to your email. Check your inbox.

verify.successDesc: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
verify.errorDesc: The link has expired or is invalid. Please sign up again to get a new verification email.

modal.title: Get started
modal.desc: Sign in or create a new account.

layout.point2: 12 AI agents that surface insights for you
layout.point3: Solo or with a team — full data ownership
